name: claudinho
description: Live scores, fixtures, and group standings for the 2026 men's football tournament. Not affiliated with FIFA or Anthropic.
long_description: Ask Claude about the 2026 men's football tournament — live scores, today's fixtures, a team's next match, group standings, and read-only prediction-market signals (informational only, not betting advice). Facts and emoji flags only; no logos, crests, or footage. An independent, open-source fan project. Not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA or Anthropic.

tools.name: get_today
tools.description: All fixtures for a date (default: today), with live scores overlaid; use get_live for in-play only.

tools.name: get_live
tools.description: Matches in play right now, with score and minute (empty when none are live).

tools.name: get_match
tools.description: A single match by id, with live score/minute when in play.

tools.name: get_standings
tools.description: Live cumulative group table(s) — one group A–L, or all.

tools.name: get_bracket
tools.description: Knockout bracket from the Round of 32 through the final, with live scores overlaid.

tools.name: get_next_fixture
tools.description: A team's next scheduled match (3-letter code, e.g. MEX).

tools.name: get_market_signal
tools.description: Read-only prediction-market signals for a match, a team's next fixture, or a date. Informational only; no links.

tools.name: get_share_snippet
tools.description: A copy-pasteable snippet for a match, a team's next fixture, a group's standings table (group), the knockout bracket, a date, or live. Plain text; carries the disclaimer.
